name: SocialFeed
short: Watch RSS/Atom feeds (YouTube, blogs, Reddit …) and post new items.
description: Add feed URLs (e.g. a YouTube channel feed, a blog, a subreddit RSS) and the bot posts new entries to a channel. Manage feeds from the web dashboard or commands. Opt-in per guild, bilingual (DE/EN).
author: Domekologe
install_msg:
Thanks for installing SocialFeed!

Load it with `[p]load socialfeed`, then configure it via its commands or the PDC web dashboard (if installed).
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-server feed configuration (feed URLs and target channels). It does not persistently store personal data about users.
